description.zh: 一场十倍缩放之旅：从 1 米的小朋友出发，滚一格放大 10 倍——树、城市、地球、银河；再反向钻进瓢虫、蚂蚁的眼睛。数位不是练习册上的表格，是宇宙的楼层。
description.en: A powers-of-ten journey: start at a 1-meter kid, scroll to zoom ×10 — trees, cities, Earth, the galaxy; then dive down into ladybugs and ants' eyes. Place value isn't a worksheet — it's the floors of the universe.
